articles.title: Tiger Woods is facing an uncertain future off the golf course after his DUI arrest in Florida
articles.description:
Woods had said earlier in the week he was trying to get in shape for the Masters on April 9-12.

The post Tiger Woods is facing an uncertain future off the golf course after his DUI arrest in Florida appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tiger Woods was arrested for DUI in Florida, raising concerns about his golf career.
Woods aimed to prepare for the Masters tournament scheduled for April 9-12.
Boston residents may see increased media attention and discussions around DUI laws.
